return(function(p,t,V,J,W,Y,U,f,l,H,k,v,G,b,E,F,g,q,s,y,d,A,w,P)E,s,H,q,l,G,w,b,y,d,P,v,F,f,k,A,g=function(p,z)local t=k(z)local V=function(V,J,W,Y,U)return l(p,{V,J,W;Y;U},z,t)end return V end,function(p)local z,l=160516+-160515,p[58994-58993]while l do P[l],z=P[l]-(637520-637519),z+(640362+-640361)if 832262-832262==P[l]then P[l],v[l]=nil,nil end l=p[z]end end,function(p,z)local t=k(z)local V=function(V,J,W,Y,U,v,P)return l(p,{V,J;W,Y,U,v,P},z,t)end return V end,function(p)P[p]=P[p]-(591925-591924)if P[p]==251221+-251221 then P[p],v[p]=nil,nil end end,function(l,V,J,W)local
